sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 아리스타 Q2 매출 22억 500만 달러, 비GAAP EPS 0.73달러 달성 — VeloCloud SD-WAN 포트폴리오 인수

keyPoints.text: Q2 2025 매출 22억 500만 달러로 전년 동기 대비 30.4% 성장 — 고객들이 AI 네트워킹 플랫폼을 선도 솔루션으로 표준화하면서 강한 수요를 견인했다.
브로드컴으로부터 VeloCloud SD-WAN 포트폴리오를 인수해 데이터센터-캠퍼스-지점을 잇는 엔드투엔드 네트워크 솔루션 포트폴리오를 확보했다.

businessChanges.text: VeloCloud SD-WAN 포트폴리오를 인수해 글로벌 WAN 서비스와 분산 캠퍼스/지점 연결 역량을 강화하고, 기존 CloudEOS 라우팅 스택과 시너지를 도모한다.
AI 기반 캠퍼스·지점 네트워킹 제품군을 확장 — 스위칭·Wi-Fi 7 액세스 포인트·WAN 기능을 아우르는 엔터프라이즈 라인업을 강화했다.
Todd Nightingale을 사장 겸 최고운영책임자(COO)로 선임 — Fastly 전 CEO 출신으로 엔터프라이즈 네트워킹 사업 확장을 주도할 예정이다.

financialHighlights.text: Q2 2025 매출 22억 500만 달러, 전분기 대비 10.0%, 전년 동기 대비 30.4% 성장했다.
Q2 2025 비GAAP 순이익 9억 2,350만 달러(EPS 0.73달러)로 전년 동기 0.53달러 대비 크게 증가했다.
Q2 2025 비GAAP 총마진 65.6%, GAAP 총마진 65.2%로 전분기 대비 개선됐다.

watchItems.text: VeloCloud SD-WAN 인수로 엔터프라이즈 WAN 시장에 본격 진입했으나, 통합 실행력과 기존 솔루션과의 시너지 달성이 중기 핵심 과제로 부상했다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 ex991q225-earningsrelease.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Arista Networks, Inc. Reports Second Quarter 2025 Financial Results SANTA CLARA, Calif.- August 5, 2025 -- Arista Networks, Inc. (NYSE: ANET), an industry leader in data-driven, client-to-cloud networking for large AI, data center, campus, and routing environments, today announced financial results for its second quarter ended June 30, 2025. Second Quarter Financial Highlights "Arista is well-positioned in data-driven AI networking, from client to cloud," said Jayshree Ullal, Chairperson and CEO of Arista Networks. “Our customers are decisively standardizing on our best of breed platform to bring transformational innovation and impact to their technology endeavors.” • Revenue of $2.205 billion, an increase of 10.0% compared to the first quarter of 2025, and an increase of 30.4% from the second quarter of 2024. • GAAP g  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.205 billion = 22억 500만 달러; $2.205 = 2.205달러.

ross margin of 65.2%, compared to GAAP gross margin of 63.7% in the first quarter of 2025 and 64.9% in the second quarter of 2024. • Non-GAAP gross margin of 65.6%, compared to non-GAAP gross margin of 64.1% in the first quarter of 2025 and 65.4% in the second quarter of 2024. • GAAP net income of $888.8 million, or $0.70 per diluted share, compared to GAAP net income of $665.4 million, or $0.52 per diluted share in the second quarter of 2024. • Non-GAAP net income of $923.5 million, or $0.73 per diluted share, compared to non-GAAP net income of $672.6 million, or $0.53 per diluted share in the second quarter of 2024. Commenting on the company's financial results, Chantel  Normalized numeric aliases: $888.8 million = 8억 8,880만 달러; $665.4 million = 6억 6,540만 달러; $923.5 million = 9억 2,350만 달러; $672.6 million = 6억 7,260만 달러; $1 billion = 10억 달러; $888.8 = 888.8달러; $0.70 = 0.70달러; $665.4 = 665.4달러; $923.5 = 923.5달러; $0.52 = 0.52달러; $0.73 = 0.73달러; $672.6 = 672.6달러; $0.53 = 0.53달러; $1 = 1달러.

ability to scale efficiently while maintaining financial discipline continues to deliver value for our shareholders." Upcoming 2025 Analyst Day Arista Networks will host its 2025 Analyst Day on Thursday, September 11, 2025, beginning at 3:00 PM PT (6:00 PM ET). Interested participants can register through the Investor Relations section of the Arista website at https://investors.arista.com/ . Company Highlights • Arista Networks Expands AI-Driven Campus and Branch Networking Offerings – Arista introduced several AI-driven enterprise products that deliver an expanded set of switching, Wi-Fi 7 access point, and WAN capabilities. • Arista Networks Acquired the VeloCloud® SD-WAN Portfolio from Broadcom – VeloCloud expands choice and performance for Arista customers, enabling global WAN services to interconnect data centers and distributed campus/branch offices, while complementing Arista's e

xisting CloudEOS® routing stack and high-end 7000-series WAN routers. • Arista Networks Recognized in the Visionaries Quadrant of the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Enterprise Wired and Wireless LAN Infrastructure published on 25 June 2025 - Gartner positioned Arista Networks as the vendor with the highest Ability to Execute in the Visionaries Quadrant in the report. 1 • Arista Expands Commitment to India for Enterprise Networking and AI Innovation – The ‘ Make in India’ initiative drives domestic manufacturing of key campus and data center switches as well as Wi-Fi 7 access points. • Arista Networks appointed Todd Nightingale as President and Chief Operating Officer - Mr. Nightingale previously served as the Chief Executive Officer and member of the Board of Directors of Fastly, Inc., and before that as the Executive Vice President and General Manager of Enterprise Networking and Clo
